name: Approach
intuition_and_algorithm:
Use bitwise OR with n + 1:

result = n | (n + 1)
n + 1 flips the rightmost 0 in n to 1, and all bits to the right become 0.
Performing OR sets that bit to 1 while leaving other bits unchanged.

complexities.time: O(1)  since only one bitwise operation is performed.
complexities.space: O(1)  since no extra space is used.
